products.name: Blue
products.description: The verification substrate every MOBLUEHQ product runs on. A private inference mesh that returns sealed, signed results - the scheduler never sees your data, and every answer carries a receipt anyone can verify.
products.description_after: The rail underneath the portfolio. For everyone building AI into decisions that carry consequences - the layer that proves how an answer was produced, not just that it sounds right.

products.name: blueMoat
products.description: Prior-art screening you can defend. Paste a disclosure and get a screened landscape where every finding carries a validated source quote, an independent second opinion, and a tamper-evident receipt. Now running its judging on the Blue substrate. For founders, IP counsel, and diligence teams - because a prior-art opinion is only worth something if it survives challenge.

products.name: blueChart
products.description: Evidence packs for utilization review - criteria cited, sources quoted verbatim, dissent shown, every pack signed and offline-verifiable. No autonomous denials, by architecture. Private demo available on request. For health plans and utilization-review teams - speed on medical review without the liability of an unexplained denial.

products.name: blueGlu
products.description: The Blue chatbot for everyone. Works offline on your own device; online it draws on the whole mesh, shows where each answer came from, and tells you when it is unsure - showing the disagreement instead of guessing.
products.description_after: Private demo available on request. For anyone who wants capable AI that works anywhere and shows its work - proof that AI you can check belongs in everyday hands, not just the data center.

products.name: slumberNet
products.description: Donate your computer's idle time to the mesh. Install it, and when you're away your machine quietly helps run verified AI work - then gets out of the way the instant you return. Built on a simple bet: if enough idle machines pitch in,
products.description_after: Private demo available on request. For anyone with a capable machine and idle hours - the supply side that lets a verifiable mesh scale without hyperscaler lock-in.
products.stage_label: Shipped - API + app, verified over the internet
products.description_bold: much of the AI work the world does will never need a giant data center built for it.

products.name: blueCheck
products.description: Verification engine running: signed receipts, offline verification, council with judge-and-doer separation. Private demo available on request.
products.description_after: Private demo available on request. For engineering and compliance leaders shipping AI features - so 'the model said so' becomes a claim you can check.

products.name: blueSentinel
products.description: The escalation gate for AI decisions. When independent models disagree - or agree too easily - it routes the case to a human instead of letting the system guess.
products.description_after: For teams running AI inside decisions that matter - because the most dangerous answers are the confident, wrong ones.

products.name: blueProof
products.description: Prove what your model is. Turns a trained decision model into evidence regulators can read — built for filings, validations, and examinations. For chief actuaries and model-risk leaders - turning a model into evidence a regulator can read.

products.name: blueWitness
products.description: A second set of eyes for the AI you already use.
products.description_after: For anyone relying on AI they didn't build - an independent second check on the tools already in their workflow.

products.name: blueAtlas
products.description: Rent verified expertise, not raw compute - ask a hard question and get an answer drawn from private expert sources, a hospital's records or a firm's case files, without anyone handing over their data.
products.description_after: For whole industries whose best answers are locked inside data nobody will share - a way to pool expertise without pooling secrets.

products.name: bluePrivacy
products.description: An extraction-control gate for sensitive nodes - so a private knowledge source can answer useful questions without giving away what it knows.
products.description_after: For anyone exposing private data to AI - the guardrail that lets a node be useful without becoming a leak.

products.name: blueProbe
products.description: The trust layer for a network of AI nodes - so the provenance attached to a result actually means something.
products.description_after: For any marketplace or mesh of AI experts - the attestation that turns 'trust me' into a checkable claim.

products.name: blueMemory
products.description: Receipt-backed institutional memory - a tamper-evident record of what your organization knew and decided.
products.description_after: For regulated organizations that must show what they knew and what they decided - memory you can hand to an examiner.

products.name: blueVeil
products.description: Keeps your private information private.
products.description_after: For people handling sensitive information - privacy that holds because the data never leaves the device.

products.name: blueVault
products.description: Everything you know, found in seconds - nothing uploaded.
products.description_after: For knowledge workers buried in their own files - instant recall with nothing uploaded.

products.name: blueScope
products.description: Meeting notes for work the cloud is not allowed to hear.
products.description_after: For teams whose conversations can't touch the cloud - meeting intelligence that stays in the room.

products.name: blueTwin
products.description: An AI that is actually yours.
products.description_after: For individuals who want AI that's genuinely theirs - owned, not rented.

products.name: blueHand
products.description: Real work, done on your machine.
products.description_after: For professionals who need real work done privately - capability that stays on their own machine.

products.name: blueMuse
products.description: Your style. Your studio. Offline.
products.description_after: For creators who want their style kept their own - a studio that runs entirely offline.

products.name: blueAnvil
products.description: AI for code that can never leave the building.
products.description_after: For engineering orgs with code that can never leave the building - AI assistance that stays inside the walls.

products.name: blueClaims
products.description: Faster claim closure with claim files that hold up. Multi-perspective evidence that resists tampering, every determination scored element-by-element and receipted for audit. For claims organizations - faster closure with files built to hold up under audit.

products.name: blueRelay
products.description: Verified AI infrastructure for regulated enterprises.
products.description_after: For regulated enterprises - verified AI infrastructure that meets them where their rules already are.

products.name: blueCredit
products.description: Lending models with examination-ready evidence, end to end. For lenders - credit models that arrive examination-ready, end to end.

products.name: blueFleet
products.description: Turn your organization's idle computers into a private verification region. Central policy, your hardware, your data - heavy AI work runs overnight on machines you already own.
products.description_after: For IT and operations leaders with idle hardware - a private AI region built from machines they already own.

products.name: blueLens
products.description: AI compliance oversight for regulated industries.
products.description_after: For compliance officers in regulated industries - oversight of AI that regulators will actually accept.

products.name: blueAssay
products.description: Quality verification for advanced manufacturing.
products.description_after: For advanced manufacturers - quality verification that produces evidence for every result.

products.name: blueLedger
products.description: Verifiable computation for clinical research.
products.description_after: For clinical research teams - computation that's verifiable from end to end.

products.name: blueWatch
products.description: Verification for security operations teams.
products.description_after: For security operations teams - verification that cuts through the alert noise.

products.name: blueDocket
products.description: Continuous prior-art watch for patent practices — the screening your team does by hand, running around the clock on every active matter. For patent practices - around-the-clock prior-art watch on every live matter.

products.name: blueScreen
products.description: Sanctions screening that justifies its own dispositions and drains the false-positive queue. For sanctions and compliance teams - screening that justifies its own calls and shrinks the false-positive queue.

products.name: blueGuard
products.description: AML evidence packets — every decision arrives with the deliberation examiners want to see. For AML investigators - evidence packets carrying the deliberation examiners expect to see.

products.name: blueChorus
products.description: Collaboration infrastructure for regulated institutions.
products.description_after: For regulated institutions - collaboration infrastructure built for their constraints.
